privileged_info_summary: The task uses a synthetic ODS spreadsheet with 10 rehearsals (R001-R010) scheduled June 3-8, 2024 across 4 actors (Alice, Bob, Charlie, Diana). The Actor_Availability sheet contains 5 unavailability records that create exactly 4 scheduling conflicts: R003 (Alice), R005 (Diana), R008 (Bob), and R009 (Charlie). The task requires agents to add a conflict detection column using formulas with minimum performance thresholds: ≥90% recall and ≥85% precision (70% pass threshold). The verifier includes a hardcoded fallback ground truth of {R003, R005, R008, R009}.
